9. The position of the loth lord in gth house is considered the best.
The native will become highly religious. intelligent and progressive
and he will make rapid progress in his profession and business. He
will build up good reputation and earn huge wealth through
ptofession as well as business. He will have many sources of income.
He will however be ci'WHitable aoo he will institute stipends and
bursaries in memory of his parents.
10. The presence of the 10\1\ lord in the loth house is considered the
